title: [HWToBTOR2] Deduce resets from (Fir)RegOps
body: Currently, the HWToBTOR2 lowering assumes all regs will only be reset by one `hw.module` argument called `%reset`, and produces incorrect BTOR2 if this isn't the case. This PR changes the pass so that register constructs in the output are instead reset by the value corresponding to the `reset` operand (if present) of the corresponding MLIR op.
